name: miqaat
description: Miqāt — a serene, local-first desktop app for prayer times, Qibla, Hijri calendar, and Athan playback.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health && npm --workspace electron run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run build:electron
scripts.package: npm run build && npm --workspace electron run install:prod-deps && npm --workspace electron run package
scripts.release: npm run build && npm --workspace electron run install:prod-deps && npm --workspace electron run release
scripts.release:draft: npm run build && npm --workspace electron run install:prod-deps && npm --workspace electron run release:draft
scripts.test:online: cross-env ONLINE=1 npm --workspace server run test
scripts.test:e2e:setup: npm run build && npm --workspace electron run install:prod-deps && npm --workspace electron run package -- --dir
